sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 텍사스 인스트루먼트는 4분기 매출 44억 2,000만 달러를 기록하며 전년 동기 대비 10% 성장했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출은 44억 2,000만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 10% 증가했으나, 전 분기 대비로는 7% 감소했습니다.
지난 12개월 동안 65억 달러를 주주에게 환원하며 강력한 현금 창출 능력을 입증했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 지난 12개월간 R&D 및 판관비에 39억 달러, 자본 지출에 46억 달러를 투자하며 미래 성장을 위한 기반을 강화했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 지난 12개월 기준 영업활동 현금흐름은 72억 달러, 잉여현금흐름은 29억 달러를 달성했습니다.

watchItems.text: 1분기 매출 가이던스인 43억 2,000만 달러에서 46억 8,000만 달러 범위 달성 여부와 EPS 변동성 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99 2 q42025txnex99-eredgar.htm EX-99 Document Exhibit 99 TI reports Q4 2025 and 2025 financial results and shareholder returns Conference call at 3:30 p.m. Central time today on ti.com/ir DALLAS (Jan. 27, 2026) – Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) (Nasdaq: TXN) today reported fourth quarter revenue of $4.42 billion, net income of $1.16 billion and earnings per share of $1.27. Earnings per share included a 6-cent reduction that was not in the company's original guidance. Regarding the company's performance and returns to shareholders, Haviv Ilan, TI's chairman, president and CEO, made the following comments: • "Revenue decreased 7% sequentially and increased 10% from the same quarter a year ago. • "Our cash flow from operations of $7.2 billion for the trailing 12 months again underscored the strength of our bu  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.42 billion = 44억 2,000만 달러; $1.16 billion = 11억 6,000만 달러; $7.2 billion = 72억 달러; $4.42 = 4.42달러; $1.16 = 1.16달러; $1.27 = 1.27달러; $7.2 = 7.2달러.

production. Free cash flow for the same period was $2.9 billion. • "Over the past 12 months we invested $3.9 billion in R&D and SG&A, invested $4.6 billion in capital expenditures and returned $6.5 billion to owners. • "TI's first quarter outlook is for revenue in the range of $4.32 billion to $4.68 billion and earnings per share between $1.22 and $1.48." 1 Free cash flow, a non-GAAP financial measure, is cash flow from operations less capital expenditures, plus proceeds from U.S. CHIPS and Science Act (CHIPS Act) incentives. Earni  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.9 billion = 29억 달러; $3.9 billion = 39억 달러; $4.6 billion = 46억 달러; $6.5 billion = 65억 달러; $4.32 billion = 43억 2,000만 달러; $4.68 billion = 46억 8,000만 달러; $2.9 = 2.9달러; $3.9 = 3.9달러; $6.5 = 6.5달러; $4,423 = 4,423달러; $1,205 = 1,205달러; $6,318 = 6,318달러; 1,163 million = 11억 6,300만 달러; 1,377 million = 13억 7,700만 달러; 1,205 million = 12억 500만 달러; 2,254 million = 22억 5,400만 달러; 7,153 million = 71억 5,300만 달러; 6,318 million = 63억 1,800만 달러.
